titulo: Windows Netlogon CVE-2026-41089 exploited: Priority patch needed
resumo: CVE-2026-41089, a critical Windows Netlogon flaw rated CVSS 9.8, is now actively exploited. Unpatched domain controllers face full SYSTEM-level compromise with no credentials needed.
